# Workshop materials (static downloads)

| File | Served at |
|------|-----------|
| `ai-cybersecurity-awareness.pdf` | `/api/export/pdf` |
| `ai-cybersecurity-awareness.pptx` | `/api/export/pptx` |

Replace these files when you update the deck. No code changes needed — redeploy to Vercel after swapping.

**Do not** leave copies in the project root; keep them here only.

**Warning:** `npm run generate:downloads` overwrites these with auto-generated exports from slide content. Use that only if you want programmatic exports — for workshop materials, drop your hand-crafted PDF/PPTX here instead.
